platform_note: Prepared as a generic structured upload package because a public WASI Intelligence import schema could not be verified.

family_identity.full_name: West Africa Export Index Fund Family

family_objective.primary_objective: Organize country-specific raw-export benchmark funds inside one regional naming and governance framework.
family_objective.secondary_objective: Create a scalable family structure that can expand to additional West African countries while keeping upload packages and methodology language aligned.

naming_system.umbrella_rule: WAEX is the umbrella family label.
naming_system.country_member_rule: Country funds use a short country-specific code ending in EX where practical and recognizable.

methodology_framework.shared_core: Country-specific raw-material export benchmarks measured in XOF using long-memory physical export-flow weighting and transparent price references.

model_types.description: For countries with port-led outward commodity flows.
For countries where export tonnage moves through border posts, regional corridors, and transit networks rather than domestic seaports.

methodology_framework.shared_governance_requirement: documented index committee and source hierarchy

regional_logic.family_expansion_thesis: A single regional family can compare coastal export systems and landlocked corridor export systems without forcing one methodology onto all countries.

technology_and_distribution.microfinance_relationship: family members remain separate from any SFD balance sheet while still supporting advisory and credit-intelligence use cases
